design_philosophy: High-end, sophisticated property marketplace. Replaces the brutalist, playful design with a 'Godly' execution. Uses massive negative space, crisp typography, and deep rich accents to create a ₹10-20 Lakh premium aesthetic.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 generously. Components with borders must have internal padding (p-6/p-8) to prevent text collision.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glass variant: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm z-50
surfaces_and_components.property_cards: Flat Solid variant. bg-white, 1px subtle border (#E5E1DB), no shadow by default. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-xl border-[#D0C9C0] transition-all duration-300.

buttons.primary: bg-[#04473C] text-white hover:bg-[#03352D] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium tracking-wide transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#04473C] text-[#04473C] hover:bg-[#E6F0EE] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors

surfaces_and_components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn based. border-[#E5E1DB] bg-[#FDFCFB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#04473C] focus:border-[#04473C] rounded-none p-4. Labels should be uppercase, tracking-[0.1em], text-xs.
surfaces_and_components.radius: Avoid heavy rounding. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px) for a sharp, architectural, premium look.

motion.hover: Subtle transforms and opacity changes. Images in cards zoom 105% on hover.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for lists and grids.

media.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from black/60 via black/30 to transparent to ensure text readability.
media.image_style: High-contrast, professional architectural photography. Images should feel wide, bright, and expensive.

hero_backgrounds.description: Premium modern white concrete house, ideal for main landing page hero.
Luxurious kitchen island, bright and inviting.

property_listings.description: Large white exterior with wooden doors.

abstract_textures.description: Abstract textured gold/black for premium banners or card overlays.

logos.description: Use as a premium badge or mock sponsor logo backdrop.

specific_pages.dashboard_rider_admin: Use strict bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Keep it clean with #FDFCFB backgrounds. Highlight actionable elements in #04473C.
specific_pages.marketing_landing: High impact. Use Playfair Display H1 text. Implement lenis for smooth scrolling. Overlap images creatively with high z-index. Hero section should feel like an architectural digest cover.
specific_pages.visit_cart_payment: Clean, trustworthy, minimal friction. Right side order summary with sticky positioning. Left side detailed cart. Use crisp borders and clear typography.

icons.style: Use thin stroke widths (1.5) for a sharper, more delicate and premium look.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive components (buttons, links, form inputs) to ensure automated testing readiness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default blue/indigo or playful neo-brutalist solid black shadows.
Remove all heavy box-shadows (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #000) and neo-brutalist aesthetics. Replace with sharp, flat designs and subtle 1px #E5E1DB borders.
For typography, import Playfair Display and Outfit via Google Fonts. Apply Playfair to all headings and Outfit to body text.
Apply data-testid to any new or modified interactive elements.
Use the specific Unsplash URLs provided in 'media' for placeholders instead of generic image services.
All property cards must have a clean, architectural look with internal padding of at least p-6. Never use full corner rounding, keep it sharp (max rounded-sm).
Ensure the hero image uses the dark overlay provided to maintain text readability.
Write components primarily for .js files (JSX) as the current environment uses .js for React files.
